title: oreochloa disticha subsp. blanka
side_effects: Oreochloa disticha subsp. blanka can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and digestive problems. In rare cases, consuming the plant can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Excessive consumption may also lead to an imbalance of electrolytes and fluids in the body, potentially resulting in dehydration and other complications. Furthermore, improper use of Oreochloa disticha subsp. blanka can interact with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
